description_long: This is a military-style flight helmet with a matte olive green finish, featuring prominent stenciled text and markings. The top of the helmet displays the alphanumeric code 'E 2C' in large white letters, while the sides are marked with the word 'NAVY' in bold yellow and blue. The rear of the helmet has a yellow 'Y' shape and the text 'USS SAIPAN STOP' in white, indicating naval association. The helmet is equipped with a dark-tinted visor, a microphone boom, and external wiring, suggesting use in aviation or communications. The surface appears hard and slightly textured, with visible rivets and a robust chin strap for secure fastening.
description: A military-style olive green flight helmet with stenciled naval markings, a dark visor, and attached communication equipment.
description_view_0: Top view showing the 'E 2C' marking and central mounting point.
description_view_1: Left-rear angled view highlighting the blue 'NAVY' text, microphone boom, and wiring.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the yellow 'Y' graphic and 'USS SAIPAN STOP' text.
description_view_3: Right-rear angled view with yellow 'NAVY' text and visible chin strap.
attribute_graphic_design: Stenciled military text and codes in white, yellow, and blue, with a yellow 'Y' motif and ship name; overall utilitarian and functional style.
